description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade features a covered porch supported by white columns, a single-car garage, and a mix of brick and horizontal siding in earth tones. Large, symmetrically arranged windows with white trim are present on all visible sides, providing ample natural light. The house sits on a neatly manicured green lawn with a concrete driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance. The rear and side elevations are primarily brick with additional windows, while the roofline includes dormers and overhangs for architectural interest. The overall design blends traditional and Craftsman elements, emphasizing comfort and curb appeal.
description: A single-story suburban house with a multi-gabled gray shingle roof, brick and siding exterior, large windows, and a covered front porch with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, single-car garage, and a mix of brick and siding with prominent windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roofline, two symmetrically placed windows, and the transition from siding to brick.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long brick wall with multiple windows and a secondary entrance, lacking the porch and garage features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gabled end, brickwork, and the driveway leading to the garage and porch area.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, single front door, brick steps, and decorative overhang
